purpose: Side 3 phase 2 proof — customer of merchant 04 (BYOK) bought, commission distributes to upline 4 levels deep
context: K (FFaG, L4 leaf in tree A) buys 8000 base units from merchant 04 (BYOK). Customer signs purchase via webhook (/webhook/purchase, HMAC-signed). Operator queue consumer writes pending_commission rows to D1 with settle_at = block_time + 30d (BACKDATE_DAYS=60 makes settle_at past). /settle/run from CF Worker fails with 403 (known RPC IP block, mitigation per session 4). scripts/settle-onchain.ts runs same logic from local IP using oracle key, submits one tx with 4 add_earnings ixs (one per active upline level), each at floor(8000 * 0.5 / 7) = 571 base units. Result: J/I/F/A each gain 571 earned. /explorer/ Total earned jumps 354 -> 2638.
